description_long: This rifle features a distinctive bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger for a compact overall length. The body is primarily matte black with blue accents and a camouflage pattern on the receiver and stock, giving it a tactical, urban appearance. The rifle has a fixed stock integrated into the main body, a prominent carrying handle with integrated iron sights, and a detachable box magazine. The barrel is standard length and ends with a visible muzzle brake. The grip is ergonomic, with a trigger guard that extends into the handguard, and the magazine is slightly curved. The overall design suggests a modern, military-style firearm suitable for urban operations.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a black and blue finish, camouflage accents, and a fixed stock. Features include a carrying handle, iron sights, a detachable box magazine, and a muzzle brake.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle brake, barrel end, and the narrow profile of the carrying handle and sights.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, camouflage details, carrying handle, trigger, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, magazine base, and the alignment of the carrying handle and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the rifle, including the stock, magazine, and handguard details.
